name: Magnesium Sulfate (MgSO4)
description: CNS depressans et anticonvulsans adhibita ad praeventionis et curationis captiones eclampticas (captiones in graviditate ex prae-eclampsia). Adhibetur etiam gravibus suspiriis et torsades de punctis. Prima acies pro eclampsia super benzodiazepinos.
indications: Eclampsia (captio praeventionis et curatio in gravi prae-eclampsia)
Torsades de Pointes (polymorphic V-tach ex hypomagnesemia)
dose: Eclampsia loading dosis: 4-6g IV tardus dis super 20 minuta. Tutela: 1-2g/hora IV infusio. Si captio recurrat: 2-4g IV super 5 min. IM loading (si non IV): 5g IM singulas clunes (10g total) simul.
window: Incipe a captione, impetu vel diagnosi gravium notarum prae-eclampsiarum.
warnings: Signa toxicity: amissio reflexorum patellaris (signum primum 7-10 mEq/L), depressionis respiratoriae (> 10 mEq/L), comprehensio cardiaci (> 15 mEq/L).
Monitor patellar reflexes per 15 minuta singula - damnum reflexum = stop infusionem.
ANTIDOTUS ad toxicitatem: Calcium gluconatum 1g IV supra 3 minuta.
Dosem reducere in detrimentum renum - monitor urinae output.

pediatric.dose: Torsades: 25-50 mg/kg IV super 10-20 min (max 2g). Gravi asthma: 25-75 mg/kg IV (max 2g).
pediatric.note: Raro ad captiones in aegris pediatricis non obstetricibus adhibitis — eclampsia prima significatio est.

obstetric.note: Prima significatio. Cruces placentae - hypermagnesemia neonatales potest. Dosis neonatalis si depressio respiratorii: calcium gluconatum 100 mg/kg IV. Inform NICU manipulus maternae magnesii usus.

source: JTS CPG: Obstetric Emergencies / Eclampsia Management Guidelines / ACOG
